[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] '''Rennt Govia''' was a high-ranking member of the [[Bakuran Senate]] at the time of the [[Bakura Incident]]. His grandparents were backers of the [[Bakur Mining Corporation]]. He attended the [[Corulag University of Economics]] and was a self-proclaimed model of [[High Human Culture/Legends|Human High Culture]]. He strongly supported [[Wilek Nereus]] attempts to succeed [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]] [[Yeorg Captison]].
